drivers.notes: Extended-frequency DAD with copper shorting ring
Sealed cork sub-enclosure; copper shorting ring

description.en: Three-way floorstander of the Sonetto G2 line — DAD Arrow Point tweeter, Camelia midrange in a sealed cork chamber and twin 165 mm paper-cone woofers in a down-firing vented box. Lute-shaped cabinet sized for medium-to-large rooms.
description.es: Floorstander de tres vías de la línea Sonetto G2 — tweeter DAD Arrow Point, midrange Camelia en cámara sellada de corcho y dos woofers de 165 mm en cono de papel con caja vented de tiro inferior. Gabinete con forma de laúd, pensado para salas medianas a grandes.
